People

Members of Yoon Lab

Our group brings together students and researchers interested in electrochemical interfaces, degradation, corrosion, and advanced diagnostic methods.

Principal Investigator

Taeho Yoon

Associate Professor

Department of Chemical Engineering, Kyung Hee University

Electrochemical interfaces, battery degradation, corrosion, impedance analysis, transient electrochemistry
